summary: Good‑quality recording (source unclear) that captures a poignant Jerry Garcia moment during Days Between.
review: The two reviewers note a solid technical capture – one even discusses the original Neumann/KM140 gear used – though the exact source remains uncertain. Musically, the highlight is an emotional rendition of “Days Between,” where Jerry Garcia was moved to tears, giving the show a memorable, if bittersweet, touch.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews; one rates recording positively (4★) while the other gives a middling show rating (3★). Weighted blend of decent audio quality and an emotionally charged but otherwise unremarkable performance yields ~3.3 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer discusses original Neumann KM140 microphones and Aerco preamps, suggesting a professional soundboard‑type capture, but admits uncertainty about the exact source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed setlist provided; reviewers focus on the emotional impact of Days Between rather than overall pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Shedding tears during Days Between, indicating a deeply felt performance.
